name: agent-awareness
description: Modular awareness plugins that broaden AI agent context with environmental data

interface.shortDescription: Inject time, weather, quota, and system context into Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Give Codex continuous awareness of real-world and operational context by combining trigger-based hooks and an MCP server for on-demand tools.
defaultPrompt: Set up agent-awareness for this Codex project and verify hooks plus MCP are active
